full_text:
Wen Ze 文則
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wen Ze (文則). Gongsun Zan’s messenger to Gongsun Xu, urging Xu to seek help from Zhang Yan. Wen Ze was affiliated with Gongsun Zan.
